name: mai-kit
description: 舞萌 DX TypeScript 工具集。

scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter './packages/*' -r run typecheck && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p tests/web/tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter './packages/*' -r --if-present run test:unit
scripts.test:web: pnpm run build && pnpm run test:web:built
scripts.test:web:built: pnpm --filter mai-kit-docs exec vite build ../tests/web && node tests/web/run.mjs
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint
scripts.fix: pnpm run format && pnpm run lint:fix
scripts.docs:dev: pnpm run build && pnpm --filter mai-kit-docs dev
scripts.docs:build: pnpm run build && pnpm run docs:build:built
